title: Mephiston: Lord of Death
author: david-annandale
description: Chief Librarian Mephiston faces a daemonic incursion that tests the limits of his power and his ongoing battle against the Black Rage — the curse that haunts all sons of Sanguinius.

title: Mephiston: Blood of Sanguinius
author: darius-hinks
description: Chief Librarian Mephiston of the Blood Angels ventures to a plague-ravaged world to uncover the source of a mysterious affliction, confronting the darkness within his own soul as much as the enemy without.

title: Mephiston: Revenant Crusade
author: darius-hinks
description: Mephiston leads a doomed crusade into a region of space where the laws of reality have broken down, hunting a threat that may be connected to the curse of the Black Rage that haunts the Blood Angels.

title: Mephiston: City of Light
author: darius-hinks
description: Mephiston is drawn to a city bathed in inexplicable light on a world at the edge of the Great Rift, where the boundary between the warp and reality has become dangerously thin and something ancient stirs.
